dashboard.title: Learning Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your learning progress and complete daily tasks

difficulties.beginnerDesc: I'm new to this field and need systematic learning
difficulties.intermediateDesc: I have some foundation and want to go deeper
difficulties.advancedDesc: I want to challenge complex problems and best practices

durations.twoWeeksDesc: Moderate pace, balance depth and breadth

comprehensiveQuiz.title: Comprehensive Quiz
comprehensiveQuiz.description: The system will generate mixed questions from your knowledge base to test your understanding
comprehensiveQuiz.instructionMixed: Mixed types: Multiple choice + True/False + Short answer
comprehensiveQuiz.instructionLevels: Covers concepts, scenarios, and application levels
comprehensiveQuiz.instructionReview: Wrong answers are automatically added to review plan
comprehensiveQuiz.shortAnswerNote: Short answer questions require manual review by a teacher or self-checking

adaptiveRecommendations.title: Learning Recommendations
adaptiveRecommendations.empty: No recommendations yet. Start learning and the system will generate suggestions.

reviewSession.rapidFirePrompt: ⏱️ Rapid Fire Mode — 30-second timed answers, consecutive correct answers trigger combos!
reviewSession.orderingPrompt: 🧩 Ordering Mode — Drag and drop to arrange steps in correct order!
reviewSession.errorHuntPrompt: 🔍 Error Hunt Mode — Find the key error in the description!
reviewSession.clozePrompt: ✏️ Cloze Mode — Fill in missing keywords, synonyms supported!
reviewSession.explainPrompt: 🧠 Explain Mode — Explain the concept in your own words, AI evaluates!
reviewSession.standardPrompt: Do you remember this knowledge point?
